name: Hearts of Palm Salad
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Can, whole hearts of palm
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the hearts of palm and cut them into bite-size pieces.
2. In a large bowl, combine the chopped hearts of palm with the remaining ingredients except lettuce leaves.
3. Pour in the vegetable oil and lemon juice, then mix well to coat everything evenly.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 1 hour to allow flavors to meld.
5. Serve the salad on lettuce leaves.
1/4 recipe - 90 calories, 1 vegetable, 2 fat exchanges (9g fat), 4 grams carbohydrate, 0 protein, 27mg sodium, 125mg potassium, 0 cholesterol
Source: Am. Diabetes Assoc. Holiday Cookbook by Betty Wedman (1986)
Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, Nov 93
